Burning Blood.description: At the end of combat, heal 6 HP.

Ring of the Snake.description: At the start of combat, draw 2 additional cards.

Cracked Core.description: At the start of combat, Channel 1 Lightning orb.

PureWater.description: At the start of combat, add a Miracle to your hand.

Art of War.description: If you do not play any Attacks during your turn, gain an extra Energy next turn.

Bag of Marbles.description: At the start of each combat, apply 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.

Bag of Preparation.description: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.

Blood Vial.description: At the start of each combat, heal 2 HP.

Bronze Scales.description: Whenever you take damage, deal 3 damage back.

Centennial Puzzle.description: The first time you lose HP each combat, draw 3 cards.

CeramicFish.description: Whenever you add a card to your deck, gain 9 Gold.

Dream Catcher.description: Whenever you rest, you may add a card to your deck.

Juzu Bracelet.description: Regular enemy combats are no longer encountered in ? rooms.

Lantern.description: Gain 1 Energy on the first turn of each combat.

MawBank.description: Whenever you climb a floor, gain 12 Gold. Loses effect when you spend Gold at the Shop.

MealTicket.description: Whenever you enter a Shop, heal 15 HP.

Nunchaku.description: Every time you play 10 Attacks, gain 1 Energy.

Oddly Smooth Stone.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Dexterity.

Omamori.description: Negate the next 2 Curses you would obtain.

Orichalcum.description: If you end your turn without Block, gain 6 Block.

Pen Nib.description: Every 10th Attack you play deals double damage.

Potion Belt.description: Upon pickup, gain 2 additional potion slots.

PreservedInsect.description: Enemies in Elite combats have 25% less HP.

Regal Pillow.description: Heal an additional 15 HP when you Rest.

Smiling Mask.description: The cost to remove cards at the Shop is always 50 Gold.

Strawberry.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 7.

The Boot.description: Whenever you would deal 4 or less unblocked Attack damage, increase it to 5.

Tiny Chest.description: Every 4th ? room is a Treasure room.

Toy Ornithopter.description: Whenever you use a Potion, heal 5 HP.

Vajra.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Strength.

Blue Candle.description: Curse cards can now be played. Playing a Curse will make you lose 3 HP and Exhaust the card.

Bottled Flame.description: Upon pickup, choose an Attack. Start each combat with this card in your hand.

Bottled Lightning.description: Upon pickup, choose a Skill. Start each combat with this card in your hand.

Bottled Tornado.description: Upon pickup, choose a Power. Start each combat with this card in your hand.

Darkstone Periapt.description: Whenever you obtain a Curse, increase your Max HP by 6.

Eternal Feather.description: For every 5 cards in your deck, heal 3 HP when you enter a Rest Site.

Frozen Egg.description: Whenever you add a Power card to your deck, it is Upgraded.

Gremlin Horn.description: Whenever a non-Minion enemy dies, gain 1 Energy and draw 1 card.

Horn Cleat.description: At the start of your 2nd turn, gain 14 Block.

Ink Bottle.description: Whenever you play 10 cards, draw 1 card.

Kunai.description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Dexterity.

Letter Opener.description: Every time you play 3 Skills in a single turn, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.

Matryoshka.description: The next 2 non-Boss chests you open contain 2 Relics.

Meat on the Bone.description: If your HP is at or below 50% at the end of combat, heal 12 HP.

Mercury Hourglass.description: At the start of your turn, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.

Molten Egg.description: Whenever you add an Attack card to your deck, it is Upgraded.

Mummified Hand.description: Whenever you play a Power, a random card in your hand costs 0 for the turn.

Ornamental Fan.description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 4 Block.

Pantograph.description: At the start of Boss combats, heal 25 HP.

Paper Krane.description: Enemies with Weak deal 40% less damage instead of 25%.

Pear.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 10.

Question Card.description: Future card rewards have 1 additional card to choose from.

Shuriken.description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Strength.

Singing Bowl.description: When adding cards to your deck, you may gain +2 Max HP instead.

StrikeDummy.description: Whenever you play a card that costs 0, deal 3 damage to a random enemy.

Sundial.description: Every 3 times you shuffle your draw pile, gain 2 Energy.

The Courier.description: The Shop always has a card removal option. Card removal is 20% cheaper.

Toxic Egg.description: Whenever you add a Skill card to your deck, it is Upgraded.

Bird Faced Urn.description: Whenever you play a Power card, heal 2 HP.

Calipers.description: At the start of your turn, lose 15 Block instead of all Block.

CaptainsWheel.description: At the start of your 3rd turn, gain 18 Block.

Dead Branch.description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, add a random card to your hand.

Du-Vu Doll.description: For each Curse in your deck, start combat with 1 additional Strength.

Fossilized Helix.description: Prevent the first time you would lose HP in each combat.

Gambling Chip.description: At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards then draw that many.

Ginger.description: You can no longer become Weakened.

Girya.description: You can now Lift at Rest Sites. Gain 1 Strength (up to 3 times).

Ice Cream.description: Energy is now conserved between turns.

Lizard Tail.description: When you would die, heal to 50% HP instead. Works once.

Mango.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 14.

Peace Pipe.description: You can now Toke at Rest Sites. Remove a card from your deck.

Pocketwatch.description: Whenever you play 3 or fewer cards in a turn, draw 3 additional cards next turn.

Prayer Wheel.description: You get 1 additional card reward to choose from.

Shovel.description: You can now Dig at Rest Sites. Obtain a relic.

StoneCalendar.description: At the end of turn 7, deal 52 damage to ALL enemies.

Thread and Needle.description: At the start of each combat, gain 4 Plated Armor.

Torii.description: Whenever you would receive 5 or less unblocked Attack damage, reduce it to 1.

Tungsten Rod.description: Whenever you would lose HP, lose 1 less.

Turnip.description: You can no longer become Frail.

Unceasing Top.description: Whenever you have no cards in hand during your turn, draw a card.

WingedGreaves.description: You can now fly over events. Skip ? rooms without entering.

Astrolabe.description: Upon pickup, choose and Transform 3 cards, then Upgrade them.

Black Blood.description: Replaces Burning Blood. At the end of combat, heal 12 HP.

Busted Crown.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. Cards no longer appear in card reward screens.

Calling Bell.description: Upon pickup, obtain a Relic and 3 Curses.

Coffee Dripper.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. You can no longer Rest at Rest Sites.

Cursed Key.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. Whenever you open a non-boss chest, obtain a Curse.

Ectoplasm.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. You can no longer gain Gold.

Empty Cage.description: Upon pickup, remove 2 cards from your deck.

Fusion Hammer.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. You can no longer Smith at Rest Sites.

HolyWater.description: Replaces PureWater. At the start of each combat, add 3 Miracles to your hand.

Hovering Kite.description: The first time you discard a card each turn, gain 1 Energy.

Inserter.description: Every 2 turns, gain 1 additional Orb slot.

Mark of Pain.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. Start combat with 2 Wounds in your draw pile.

Nuclear Battery.description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Plasma.

Pandora's Box.description: Upon pickup, Transform all Strikes and Defends.

Philosopher's Stone.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. ALL enemies start with 1 Strength.

Ring of the Serpent.description: Replaces Ring of the Snake. At the start of each combat, draw 1 additional card.

Runic Cube.description: Whenever you lose HP, draw 1 card.

Runic Dome.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. You can no longer see enemy intents.

Runic Pyramid.description: At the end of your turn, you no longer discard your hand.

SlaversCollar.description: During Boss and Elite combats, gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn.

Snecko Eye.description: Draw 2 additional cards each turn. Start each combat Confused.

Sozu.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. You can no longer obtain Potions.

Tiny House.description: Upon pickup: gain 50 Gold, gain 5 Max HP, obtain 1 Potion, Upgrade 1 random card.

Velvet Choker.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. You cannot play more than 6 cards per turn.

WristBlade.description: Attacks that cost 0 deal 4 additional damage.

Bloody Idol.description: Whenever you gain Gold, heal 5 HP.

Enchiridion.description: At the start of each combat, add a random Power to your hand. It costs 0 for that turn.

FaceOfCleric.description: Raise your Max HP by 1 after each combat.

MutagenicStrength.description: At the start of each combat, gain 3 Strength and 3 Lose Strength.

Nloth's Gift.description: Triple the chance of receiving rare cards as rewards.

NlothsMask.description: The next non-boss chest you open is empty.

Necronomicon.description: The first Attack you play each turn that costs 2+ is played twice.

Neow's Lament.description: Enemies in your first 3 combats will have 1 HP.

Nilry's Codex.description: At the end of your turn, you may choose 1 of 3 random cards to shuffle into your draw pile.

Red Mask.description: At the start of each combat, apply 1 Weak to ALL enemies.

SsserpentHead.description: Whenever you enter a ? room, gain 50 Gold.

WarpedTongs.description: At the start of your turn, Upgrade a random card in your hand for the rest of combat.
